549.15(1): 'byor pa brtag pa dang / thob dka' ba brtag pa'o/ /dal ba brtag pa ni/ ma 
549.16(1): nyams pa bdun dang ldan te/ rten ma nyams pa dang / gling ma nyams pa dang /
549.17(1): gnas ma nyams pa/ dbang po ma nyams pa/ shes pa ma nyams pa/ las ma nyams 
549.18(1): pa/ las kyi mtha' ma nyams pa'o/ /rten nyams pa gang zhe na/ ngan song gsum gyi 
549.19(1): sems can no/ /ma nyams pa gang zhe na/ mi lus lha lus rin po che'o/ /gling nyams 
549.20(1): pa gang zhe na/ gling chung brgyad do/ /ma nyams pa lho 'dzam bu gling ngo / /gnas 
549.21(1): nyams pa ni/ mon nam gla glo'i gnas so/ /ma nyams pa stag gzig yul 'ol mo 
550.1(1): lung ring la sogs pa'o/ /dbang po nyams pa ni/ 'on dig la sogs pa'o/ /ma 
550.2(1): nyams pa ni dbang po la skyon med pa'o/ /shes pa nyams pa ni/ rlung dang lha 'dres 
550.3(1): dbang byas pa'o/ /ma nyams pa ni shes pa la rang dbang thob pa'o/ /las nyams pa 
550.4(1): ni sdig pa'i phyogs su gzhol ba'o/ /las ma nyams pa ni dge ba'i phyogs la mos shing 
550.5(1): gus pa'o/ /las kyi mtha' log pa ni/ sngon bon spyod byed pa'i 'phro la/ da lta bon 
550.6(1): spyod mi byed pa'o/ /ma log pa g.yung drung gi bon mthar phyin par spyod pa'o/ /'byor 
550.7(1): ba brtag pa la ma log pa bdun dang ldan pa/ bde bar gshegs pa'i lung gi snang 
550.8(1): ba ma log pa ngur mo la ngar yod pa lta bu'o/ /gshen rab bla ma'i bka'i snang ba ma 
550.9(1): log pa/ mkhreg pa'i rdo la zur yod pa lta bu/ rang shes rab kyi snang ba ma log pa/
550.10(1): btsa' la rlan ma zhugs pa lta bu/ mtshams sbyor byed pa'i dus kyi snang ba ma log pa/
550.11(1): snga phyis dus gcig gis bsdus pa lta bu/ bya ba byed pa ma log pa 'tshogs pa'i rdzas 
550.12(1): la skyes bu'i lag gi rtsol ba byed par zhugs pa lta bu/ yo byad rgyu'i snang ba ma log 
550.13(1): pa shing gi bungs cher yod pa lta bu/ mthar phyin pa 'bras bu'i snang ba ma log pa/
550.14(1): bsreg 'tshod kyi bya ba byed pa me lta bu'o/ /yo byad kyi rgyu lnga ni/ gzhi dad pa/ grogs 
550.15(1): brtson 'grus/ rkyen bla ma/ don bsgom pa/ lam bar chod med pa/ thob pa dka' 
550.16(1): ba la gsum/ thob pa dka' ba'i gtan tshigs/ ma thob pa'i skyon dang / thob pa'i 
550.17(1): yon tan/ gtan tshigs dus gsum nyams log bdun bdun gnyis 'byung ba'i 
550.18(1): phyir/ dal 'byor phun sum 'tshogs pa de thob par dka' bas brtag go /skyon la 
550.19(1): lnga/ dga' ba de thob rung ma thob rung snyams na/ dal 'byor ma thob na 'bras bu 
550.20(1): bsgrub pa'i thabs med pa'i skyon/ thabs de yod rung med rung snyam na/ thabs 'di 
550.21(1): la brten nas byang chub kyi 'bras bu thob/ thabs 'di la ma brten na byang chub kyi 
551.1(1): 'bras bu mi thob pa'i skyon/ byang chub kyi 'bras bu rang thob rung ma thob rung snyam 
551.2(1): na/ 'bras bu ma thob na 'khor bar 'khyams pa'i skyon/ 'khor bar 'khyams rung ma 
551.3(1): 'khyams rung snyam na yang / 'khor bar 'khyams na yang 'khor ba la nyes dmigs 
551.4(1): 'byung ba'i skyon/ byung tsam na 'khor ba rang bzhag pas chog snyam na/ nyes dmigs 
551.5(1): byung tsam na/ 'khor ba rang bzhag pa dka' ba'i skyon/ nyes dmigs la dgu/
551.6(1): 'khor ba'i gnas la btson ra lta bu'i nyes dmigs/ rgyud la skyes pa'i nyon mongs 
551.7(1): pa la sbrul lta bu'i nyes dmigs/ sdig pa'i las la spyod pa la btsan dug lta bu'i 
551.8(1): nyes dmigs/ rnyed pa dang bkur sti la/ rnyi dang rgya lta bu'i nyes dmigs/ sdang 
551.9(1): pa'i dgra la nad gdug pa can nam/ rims mi bzod lta bu'i nyes dmigs/ gdung 
551.10(1): ba'i gnyen la 'khor ba'i bshal thag lta bu'i nyes dmigs/ zang zing gi nor la

551.12(1): dmigs/ mi tshe la chu bur lta bu'i nyes dmigs so/ /bzhag dka' ba'i skyon dgu 
551.13(1): la/ snang bas brid sla ba/ 'khor ba bzhag dka' ba/ rig pa gcol chung ba/ mi 
551.14(1): rtag 'khor ba nyams dga' ba/ sdug bsngal 'phro gshin pa/ nyon mongs dbang che ba/
551.15(1): gzung 'dzin 'phrang dam pa/ zhen chags kha drag pa/ ma rtogs pa'i rgya mtsho gting

551.17(1): bas g.yung drung gi bon byar khoms pa/ 'byor bas bon spyad du yod pa'o/ /rdzogs

551.19(1): dang po'o// //
551.20(1): 7 dad pa bskyed pa la bdun/ dad pa rang sa na mtshon pa/ med pa'i skyon/
551.21(1): btsal ba'i lugs/ yod pa'i yon tan/ bgrang pa'i tshad/ brten pa'i thabs/ dad 
552.1(1): pa'i gol sa dgag pa'o/ /rang sa na mtshon pa la bzhi/ dad pa'i ngo bo/ nges tshig /
552.2(1): dbye ba/ las so/ /ngo bo ni rang gi shes pa dwangs ba'i bdag nyid las dge ba dang 
552.3(1): gtug gis 'phrad pa'o/ /nges tshig dkar po'i phyogs su dad pas dad pa'o/ /dbye 
552.4(1): ba la bzhi/ mos pa'i dad pa/ dang ba'i dad pa/ yid ches pa'i dad pa/ mthar

552.10(1): la gnyan pa med pa dang 'dra/ lag rdum gser gling du phyin pa dang 'dra/ long ba 
552.11(1): lha khang du phyin pa dang 'dra/ spyang mo 'khor dong du tshud pa dang 'dra/ sa bon mes

552.13(1): rab bla ma'i rgyud la brten te dad pa btsal ba dang / bka'i rgyud la brten te dad

552.15(1): gyi rgyud la brten te dad pa btsal ba'o/ /gshen rab bla ma la gnyis/ gshen rab bla

552.18(1): don la rten te dad pa btsal ba dang / bka' rgyud nges don la brten te dad 
552.19(1): pa btsal ba'o/ /rang gi rgyud la brten te dad pa btsal ba la gnyis/ rang dal 
552.20(1): 'byor phun sum 'tshogs pa la brten te dad pa btsal ba dang / mi rtag pa rgyud la 
552.21(1): brten te dad pa btsal ba'o/ /'gro ba gzhan gyi rgyud la brten te dad pa btsal ba 
553.1(1): la gnyis/ gzhan dal 'byor phun sum 'tshogs pa la brten te dad pa btsal ba 
553.2(1): dang / sdug bsngal dpag tu med pa la brten te dad pa btsal ba'o/ /yon tan 
553.3(1): ni dad pa yod pa'i gshen rab de// dpe ni sa gzhi gshin po dang 'dra/ chu bo sgrol 
553.4(1): ba'i gru dang 'dra/ 'jigs pa chen po'i skyel ma dang 'dra/ so mtshams bsrung ba'i 
553.5(1): mkhar spe dang 'dra/ 'gro ba 'dul ba'i ded dpon dang 'dra/ yid bzhin gyi nor 
553.6(1): bu rin po che dang 'dra'o/ /tshad ni dad pa rang gi rgyud la yang ma skyes/ btsal bas 
553.7(1): kyang ma rnyed na/ bgrang ma tshang gi dpe drug /srog ma chad pa'i ro yin/ chang ma 
553.8(1): 'thung pa'i ra ro ba yin/ lha 'dres ma rlam pa'i bsnyon pa yin/ sug bzhi sa la mi

553.10(1): gser gyi sna lung can yin/ bud med ji ltar yon tan che yang dad pa gting nas 
553.11(1): med na/ ba g.yu'i khol thag can yin/ thabs ni dad pa rgyud la brten pa'i thabs

553.13(1): la brten te spel/ 'grib pa'i rkyen bzhi'i khar mi btang / yod pa'i rtags bzhi

553.18(1): skye ba'i yul ni/ las rgyu 'bras dang gnas mtho dma' la brten te skye/ mthar phyin 
553.19(1): pa'i dad pa skye ba'i yul ni/ dad pa de rnams rang gi rgyud la tshang zhing rdzogs pa 
553.20(1): las skye'o/ /'phel ba'i rgyu bzhi ni/ gshen rab bla ma dam pa/ yun du brten te mos 
553.21(1): gus tshud na dad pa 'phel/ grogs khyad par can gyi mdzad spyod la brten nas dad

555.18(1): 'byung pa'i lung dang ldan pa/ thos bsam shes rab rgyud la sbyangs pa/ gtan la

557.20(1): 7 rang rgyud gdul ba la drug ste/ mi rtag pa rgyud la bskyed de rang rgyud gdul 
557.21(1): ba dang / glen pa rgyud la spangs te rang rgyud gdul ba dang / dka' ba rgyud la sgril 
558.1(1): te rang rgyud gdul ba dang /ldan pa'i shes pa rang gi rgyud la sbyangs te rang rgyud 
558.2(1): gdul ba dang / mi ldan pa'i blo rgyud la bzlog ste rang rgyud gdul ba dang / nan

558.4(1): bskyed pa la bzhi ste/ dang po gang mi rtag na/ phyi snod mi rtag ste gling bzhi ri rab 
558.5(1): dang bcas pa 'di yang / dus mtha' bskal pas 'jig /nang bcud kyi sems can 
558.6(1): mi rtag ste/ dpe ci dang 'dra bar mi rtag na/ lus mi rtag pa g.yang sa'i sdong po 
558.7(1): dang 'dra/ dbugs mi rtag pa na bun dang 'dra/ yid mi rtag pa nam mkha'i glog 
558.8(1): dang 'dra/ tshe mi rtag pa rtsa kha'i zil pa dang 'dra'o/ /tshul gang gi sgo nas mi rtag na/
558.9(1): 'chi ba bzhi sgrag gis tshul gyi mi rtag go /'chi nges/ nam 'chi cha med/ 'chi ba la 
558.10(1): cis mi sdongs/ 'chi ba rang gi dngos po'o/ /'chi nges pa la bon bzhi/ phung po 
558.11(1): 'dus byas yin pas 'chi nges/ sngar lus pa med pas 'chi nges/ tshe skad cig ma 
558.12(1): yin pas 'chi nges/ byas pa thams cad mi rtag pa yin pas 'chi nges so/ /nam 'chi 
558.13(1): cha med pa'i bon bzhi la/ tshe la nges pa med pas nam 'chi cha med/ lus la snying po 
558.14(1): med pas nam 'chi cha med/ 'chi ba la rkyen mang bas nam 'chi cha med/ snang ba 
558.15(1): brtag mi bzod pas nam 'chi cha med do/ /'chi ba la cis kyang mi bsdongs pa'i bon 
558.16(1): bzhi la/ brtsigs pa'i mkhar gyis 'chi ba la mi sdongs/ bsags pa'i nor gyis 'chi 
558.17(1): ba la mi sdongs/ pha dang ma dang 'brel pa'i gnyen 'brel gyis 'chi ba la mi sdongs/
558.18(1): rang lus kyi pho sgo'i she mo dang smra lces 'chi ba la mi sdongs so/ /'chi ba rang gi dngos 
558.19(1): po'i bon bzhi la/ mal gyi tha ma nyal ba/ gnyen 'dun gyi tha ma bskor ba/ za chu'i tha 
558.20(1): ma za ba/ gtam gyi tha ma smra ba'o/ /de rnams kyi chings bzhi la 'chi nges pas bon bya 
558.21(1): bar spyad/ nam 'chi cha med pas bon phyi bshol du mi btang / 'chi ba la cis kyang 
559.1(1): mi sdong pas bon rkyen dbang du mi btang / 'chi ba rang gi dngos po thog gsum nas 
559.2(1): shes shing bon gsum dang ldan par bya'o/ /rab lta thog nas 'chi ste/ 'chi bas mi 
559.3(1): 'jigs pa'i bon dang ldan pa'o/ /'bring bsgom thog nas 'chi ste/ 'chi ba brod pa'i 
559.4(1): bon dang ldan pa'o/ /tha ma spyod pa'i thog nas 'chi ste/ 'chi khar mi 'gyod pa'i 
559.5(1): sems bon dang ldan pa'o/ /phan yon dgos pa la bzhi/ dad pa'i gsol 'debs 
559.6(1): byed/ brtson 'grus kyi grogs byed/ chags sdang zhi bar byed/ mnyam pa nyid kyi don 
559.7(1): rtogs par byed pa'o/ /glen pa rgyud la spangs pa ni/ glen pa'i mdo bzhi ngo bo dgu 
559.8(1): phrugs so/ /mdo bzhi la/ bdag tu gzung ba'i glen pa gsum/ bdag gir bzung 
559.9(1): pa'i glen pa gsum/ bya byed las kyi glen pa gnyis/ mthar thug don gyi glen pa 
559.10(1): gcig go /ngo bo dgu la/ bdag tu bzung pa'i glen pa gsum ni/ rang lus mi rtag 
559.11(1): pa sgyu ma'i rang bzhin la/ lhag pa'i bsnyen bkur byed pa de shin tu glen/ mi lus 
559.12(1): 'di'i sdug bsngal phra mo mi bzod par/ ngan song gsum gyi sdug bsngal bzod du re 
559.13(1): ba shin tu glen/ sdug bsngal chen po nam yong cha med par/ tshe 'di rtag par bzung 
559.14(1): nas nya ra byed pa de shin tu glen pa'o/ /bdag gir bzung ba'i glen pa gsum ni/
559.15(1): dgra mi rtag pa sgyu ma la/ lhag pa'i zhe sdang byed pa de glen/ gnyen mi rtag pa sgyu ma 
559.16(1): la/ lhag pa'i gdung ba byed pa de glen/ nor mi rtag pa sgyu ma la/ lhag pa'i zhen 
559.17(1): chags byed pa de glen no/ /bya byed las kyi glen pa gnyis ni/ don yod pa'i dge ba 
559.18(1): bcu po mi sgrub par/ / don med 'khrul pa'i las la yengs te shin tu glen/ mi lus 
559.19(1): gtsang ma rin po che 'di thob nas byang chub kyi 'bras bu myur du mi sgrub par rang gi 
559.20(1): rang sdug shom pa de glen no/ /mthar thug don gyi glen pa gcig ni/ bden pa'i bon 
559.21(1): sku thig le nyag gcig la mi bsdud par/ mtshon pa'i tshig gi mtha' la zhen pa glen 
560.1(1): no/ /dka' ba rgyud la sgril ba la dka' ba dgu ni/ dang po rdzogs pa chen po'i 
560.2(1): gdams ngag gi rten/ mi lus rin po che 'di thob pa shin tu dka'/ las kyi rnam 
560.3(1): par smin pa snyeg ring pa'i phyir ro/ /mi lus rin po che thob kyang / dpon gsas bla 
560.4(1): ma dam pa dang mjal ba shin tu dka'/ bar du gcod pa'i bgegs grangs mang 
560.5(1): pa'i phyir ro/ /gshen rab bla ma dam pa dang mjal yang / gshen rab bla ma'i 
560.6(1): zhabs nas 'degs pa shin tu dka'/ lan chags bu lon dos drag pa'i phyir ro/ /
560.7(1): gshen rab bla ma'i zhabs nas bteg kyang / zhabs rtog te shes pas mthong pa shin 
560.8(1): tu dka'/ ser sna'i mdud pa khong dam pa'i phyir ro/ /zhabs rtog ste shes pas theng 
560.9(1): kyang / gshen rab bla ma dam pa brten pa'i chags phyir/ brtson zhing 'grus pa de 
560.10(1): shin tu dka'/ le lo btang snyoms gros zab pa'i phyir/ gshen rab bla ma'i phyag phyir 
560.11(1): brtson zhing 'grus par byas kyang / gshen rab bla ma'i gdams ngag de go ba shin tu 
560.12(1): dka'/ rang gi rgyud la rtog pa'i bag chags tshan che ba'i phyir ro/ /gshen rab bla 
560.13(1): ma'i gdams ngag go yang / go thog tu 'jog nus pa de shin tu dka'/ sems can 
560.14(1): gyi las dbang khas drag pa'i phyir ro/ /go thog tu 'jog nus kyang / nus thog tu 
560.15(1): bsten pa de shin tu dka'/ rig pa sems gya gyu mang pa'i phyir ro/ /de'i phyir bla na 
560.16(1): med pa'i byang chub kyi 'bras bu thob pa shin tu dka'/ dka' ba brgyad 'phrang dam 
560.17(1): pa'i phyir ro/ /dka' ba'i 'phrang brgyad ni/ mi lus thob par dka' bar 'dug go 
560.18(1): la sogs pa'o/ /rgyud la sgril ba ni/ dang por mi lus rin po che thob par dka' ste/
560.19(1): sngar thob nas gshen rab bla ma'i drung du 'dud/ ma thob na sgrub ste thob par bya'o/ /
560.20(1): de la gnyis/ mi lus rin po che mtshon par byed pa'i mtshan nyid dang / de sgrub par 
560.21(1): byed pa'i thabs so/ /dang po la bdun/ rigs bzang zhing khungs btsun pa/
561.1(1): gzugs bzang zhing lta ba mdzes pa/ gzi brjid che zhing brjid dang ldan pa/ na tsha 
561.2(1): dkon pa/ tshe ring pa/ 'byor ba yo byad phun sum 'tshogs pa/ shes rab yongs su 
561.3(1): byang pa'o/ /gnyis pa de bsgrub par bya ba la/ sgrub thabs nyi shu rtsa gcig /bdun 
561.4(1): po re la yang 'gal rkyen spang pa/ mthun rkyen brten pa/ cha mthun gyi spyod lam bya 
561.5(1): ba'o/ /rigs bzang zhing khungs btsun pa la ni/ 'gal rkyen nyon mongs pa nga rgyal 
561.6(1): spongs/ mthun pa'i rkyen zhi ba bsgom/ cha mthun gyi spyod lam la/ dge sbyor kun la 
561.7(1): brtson pa'o/ /gzugs bzang pa la nyon mongs pa khong khro spangs/ mthun pa'i rkyen 
561.8(1): bzod pa bsgom/ me tog gi mchod pa rtag tu 'bul lo/ /gzi byin che ba la nyon 
561.9(1): mongs pa 'phrag dogs spangs/ yangs pa bsgom/ gshen rab bla ma la mos gus 
561.10(1): cher bya'o/ /na tsha dkon pa la sems can la brdung brdeg spangs/ nad g.yog bya/
561.11(1): sman gyi sbyin pa rtag tu bkye/ tshe ring pa la srog gcod pa spangs/ srog skyabs bya/ tsha

561.13(1): gyi rdzas la ma byin pa len pa spangs/ med pa drug ldan gyi tshogs sogs bya/ kha dang 
561.14(1): lag gi sbyin pa rtag tu dgye'o/ /med pa drug ni yul la dmigs pa med pa/ bsam 
561.15(1): pa la sel med pa/ dad pa la 'gyur ldog med pa/ rdzas la zhen pa med pa/ tha ma la

561.17(1): shes rab rnam gsum sbyongs pa la bar chad mi bya/ rang shes rab rnam pa gsum la 
561.18(1): gnas par bya/ mar me'i mchod pa rtag tu 'bul bar bya'o/ /gshen rab bla ma dang 
561.19(1): mjal ba dka' ste/ sngar mjal nas kyang zhabs nas 'degs par bya'o/ /ma 
561.20(1): mjal na bar chad kyi dbang du mi btang par/ drung du phyin la mjal/ zhabs nas 
561.21(1): bteg pa dka' ste/ sngar bteg na'ang shes pas mthong par bya/ ma bteg na lan 
562.1(1): chags kyi dbang du mi btang par mnyes par phul la bteg /shes pas mthong pa 
562.2(1): dka' ste/ shes pas sngar btang nas phyag phyir 'brengs pa la brtson 'grus bya/ ma 
562.3(1): btang na ser sna'i dbang du mi btang par/ 'dzin chags med par thong / brtson

562.5(1): zhing ma 'grus na le lo'i dbang du mi btang par/ rjes 'breng brtson 'grus bya/
562.6(1): gdams ngag go ba dka' ste/ sngar go na go thog tu 'jog nus par bya/ ma go na 
562.7(1): bag chags kyi dbang du mi btang par/ thugs dgongs go bar bya/ go thog tu 
562.8(1): bzhag nus pa dka' ste/ sngar nus na nus thog tu btang par bya/ mi nus na las kyi 
562.9(1): dbang du mi btang par/ cis kyang nus par bya'o/ /nus thog tu brtan pa dka' ste/
562.10(1): sngar brtan na 'bras bu thob par bya/ ma brtan na gya gyu'i dbang du mi btang par 
562.11(1): rtse gcig tu nan tan bya'o/ /'bras bu thob pa dka' ste/ sngar thob nas 'gro ba'i 
562.12(1): don bya/ ma thob nas 'phrang brgyad kyi dbang du mi btang / thar pa'i 'bras bu thob 
562.13(1): par bya/ mi ldan pa'i blo rgyud la ldog pa la/ gang zag blo yi rigs dbye ba/ khyad 
562.14(1): par dang khyad par gyi dus/ stan pa gdams pa'i rgyas gdab pa'o/ /gang zag gi 
562.15(1): blo yi rigs la bdun/ 'dod ngan gyi rdzong la zhen pa gang zag gi blo yi rigs/ rtsol 
562.16(1): ba zhan pa sgyu snyoms can gyi gang zag blo'i rigs/ ma nges pa'i blo gya gyu can gyi 
562.17(1): rigs/ zhe sdang gi blo dmu rgod lta bu'i rigs/ gti mug gi blo rang bzhin gyis blun 
562.18(1): pa'i rigs/ phyogs zhen gyi blo mur lhung pa'i rigs/ tshig 'phyos kyi kha lo yongs su 
562.19(1): byang pa'i rigs so/ /khyad par gyi dus la bdun/ ltas ngan gyi spyang thag bcad pa'i 
562.20(1): dus/ brtson 'grus kyi rta la zhon pa'i dus/ ma nges pa'i lam 'phrang bcad pa'i 
562.21(1): dus/ zhe sdang gi me dbal bsad pa'i dus/ gti mug gi mun pa bsal ba'i dus/
563.1(1): don la ser sna'i mdud pa dgrol ba'i dus/ rnam par g.yeng ba'i rlung bcing pa'i 
563.2(1): dus so/ /gdams pa rtag pa la bdun/ chu shing gi snying po ltar/ bon la bzlas la 
563.3(1): gdams pa dang / skyes bu shing a 'bras kyi 'bras bu ltar/ bon rnams gang byed kyi 
563.4(1): gzhung bsrang la gdams pa dang / skyes bus gzong brdeg pa ltar/ bon rnams 
563.5(1): gnad du gdams pa/ lcags brdung mkhan gyi tho thabs bzhin/ bon myur bar 
563.6(1): gdams pa/ nad pa'i kha zas bzhin/ bon gar mos la gdams pa gdab pa/ khu 
563.7(1): byug gi skad bzhin/ bon rnam grangs skad la gdams pa/ byis pa zla ba mtshon pa 
563.8(1): bzhin/ bon nyams la gdams pa'o/ /de yang mi ldan pa'i blo rnam pa bdun/ khyad 
563.9(1): par gyi dus rnam pa bdun/ gdams pa'i rtags rnam pa bdun gyis/ mi ldan pa'i 
563.10(1): blo ldog tshul la gdams pa'o/ /ldan pa'i shes rab rgyud la skye tshul du gdams pa la 
563.11(1): gsum/ thos pa las gyur pa'i shes rab/ bsam pa las gyur pa'i shes rab/ bsgom 
563.12(1): pa las gyur pa'i shes rab/ shes rab rnam pa gsum po des/ rgyud sbyang lugs la 
563.13(1): gsum las/ spyir dgos pa rgyu 'bras kyi tshul du rgyud sbyang pa dang / bye brag tu ldog 
563.14(1): skye'i tshul du rgyud sbyang pa dang / sbyangs pa'i dgos pa'o/ /dang po la gnyis/ dgos 
563.15(1): pa'i tshul dang / rgyu 'bras kyi tshul lo/ /dgos pa'i tshul la gsum/ thos pa las gyur 
563.16(1): pa'i shes rab skom pas chu tshol ba lta bu gcig dgos/ bsam pa las gyur pa'i shes 
563.17(1): rab ltogs pas zas za ba lta bu/ bsgom pa las gyur pa'i shes rab ngal dub gnyid

563.20(1): thog skyes pa lta bu gcig skyes te/ de skyes pas bsgom pa las gyur pa'i shes rab rtsi 
563.21(1): thog la 'bras bu smin pa lta bu gcig smin no/ /bye brag tu ldog skye'i tshul la gnyis/
564.1(1): mi ldan pa'i blo ldog tshul dang / ldan pa'i blo skye tshul lo/ /ldog tshul la gsum/ thos 
564.2(1): pa las gyur pa'i shes rab kyis/ snod kha sbubs las ldog /bsam pa las gyur pa'i

564.5(1): rno la ngar btags pa'i tshul du skye'o/ /bsam pa las gyur pa'i shes rab spang la me 
564.6(1): mched pa'i tshul du skye/ bsgom pa las byung pa'i shes rab yid bzhin gyi nor bu rin 
564.7(1): po che la dgos 'dod 'byung pa'i tshul du skye'o/ /shes rab gsum po de rgyud la sbyangs 
564.8(1): pa'i dgos pa la gsum/ thos pa las byung pa'i shes rab rgyud la 'byongs na/ 'gro

564.10(1): shes rab rgyud la 'byongs na/ phyir rgol ba'i rtsod pa la nyams mi nga ba'i dgos pa/
564.11(1): bsgom pa las gyur pa'i shes rab rgyud la 'byongs na/ byang chub kyi 'bras bu la 
564.12(1): nyams mi nga ba'i dgos pa'o/ /nan tan gyi gdams ngag rgyud la bsnan pa la 
564.13(1): gsum/ log par lta ba khyer bzhi'i khar mi btang / rgyud mdzes pa'i chas chen 
564.14(1): bzhir gzhug pa/ rgyun bsring pa las kyi 'phro bzhi mthud pa'o/ /log par lta ba khyer 
564.15(1): bzhi ni/ slob dpon go 'dris khyer ba/ gdams ngag rna dred khyer ba/ dad pa snod 
564.16(1): rnying khyer ba/ dam tshig tshod yod khyer ba'o/ /de bzhi'i khar mi gtong / rgyud mdzes 
564.17(1): pa'i chas bzhir gzhug pa ni/ bon mdzad rnams kyi rgyud dman pa'i chas su gzhug 
564.18(1): la/ 'jig rten gyi grags pa gzhom pa/ rgyud thos bsam gyi chas su gzhug la/ lta 
564.19(1): sgom gyis sgros 'dogs bcad pa/ rgyud dad pa'i chas su gzhug la/ 'chi ba rjes su 
564.20(1): dran par bya/ rgyud brtson 'grus kyi chas su gzhug la/ gshen rab bla ma'i gdams 
564.21(1): ngag nyams su blangs par bya'o/ /rgyun bsring pa las kyi 'phro bzhi mthud pa ni/ rang

565.6(1): smar byang skor gsum las/ rang rgyud 'dul ba'i le'u ste bzhi pa'o// //
565.7(1): 7 thun mongs spyi'i gdams ngag zhes bya ba rdzogs so/ /thugs rgyud thams cad

565.12(1): ba'o/ /dang po ni rtags nyi shu gtan la dbab ste/ sangs rgyas kyi dgongs pa la bde

565.17(1): zung du 'brel par bzhugs pa/ dbyings dang ye shes 'du 'bral med par bzhugs

566.1(1): pa'o/ /sems can gyi rgyud la sangs rgyas kyi dgongs pa bzhugs tshul gtan la

566.13(1): du gshen rab grub pa thob pa rnams la/ snyan nas snyan du bsgrags/ thugs nas 
566.14(1): thugs su brgyud pa'i brnag pa skor gsum zhes kyang bya/ rgyud sde lung sde thams cad

566.16(1): lugs rtogs pa'i lta ba/ mnyam par bzhag pa'i bsgom pa/ rjes las thob pa'i spyod

566.18(1): bya/ yang lta ba rtogs pa'i rtsa ba can/ bsgom pa nyams kyi rtsa ba can/ spyod pa byar 
566.19(1): med kyi rtsa ba can/ 'bras bu thob med kyi rtsa ba can du ston pas/ rtsa ba bzhi sgrag 
566.20(1): gam/ yang lta thog tu spros pa bcad pa/ bsgom thog tu goms pa bskyed pa/ spyod 
566.21(1): thog tu bya byed bzlog pa/ 'bras bu'i thog tu sgrib g.yogs dang bral ba/ thog bzhi 
567.1(1): khong bskor ram/ thog bzhi'i gnad du mtshon nas ston pa/ thog bzhi gnad kyi 
567.2(1): gdams ngag go /lta thog tu spros pa bcad pa la zung bzhi ya brgyad/ mtha' drug 
567.3(1): bcad la thun drug bsten/ med lnga bsgrigs la gzer lnga gdab/ mdo bzhi bsdus 
567.4(1): la gdams bzhi gdab/ gnas gsum dkrol nas rtags gsum 'char/ mtha' 
567.5(1): drug bcad pa ni/ rdzogs pa chen po lkugs pa'i mtha'/ 'byams pa'i mtha'/ byer 
567.6(1): ba'i mtha'/ 'dus pa'i mtha'/ rkyang pa'i mtha'/ sbags pa'i mtha'/ mthun drug 
567.7(1): bsten pa ni/ lkugs na smra ba'i gdams ngag ston/ 'byams na bskyor ba'i gdam 
567.8(1): ngag ston/ byer na bsdu ba'i gdam ngag ston/ 'dus na dgram pa'i gdam ngag 
567.9(1): ston/ rkyang na sdebs pa'i gdam ngag ston/ sbag na bsal ba'i gdam ngag ston 
567.10(1): pa'o/ /lkugs na smra ba'i gdams ngag ni/ lkugs pa'i mtha' ni rdzogs pa chen po'i 
567.11(1): lta ba'i mtha' ni/ smra med brjod med yin zer nas lan med par mgo bo bsgril ba 
567.12(1): de'o/ /smra ba'i gdams ngag bstan pa ni/ rang gzhung sgrub pa'i rig 'gros ltar smra 
567.13(1): ste/ dam bca' ba gsum/ gtan tshigs bdun/ dgos dgongs dgu ltar smra'o/ /
567.14(1): dam bca' ba gsum ni/ gzhi snying po byang chub kyi sems de bon can/ ma bkag 
567.15(1): pa'i ngos nas snang bar dam bca'/ ma skyes pa'i ngos nas stong par dam bca' 
567.16(1): ba'o/ /so mi so'i (so so ma yin pa'i ) ngos nas gnyis med du dam bca' ba'o/ /

587.21(1): nas thugs su brgyud/ snyan nas snyan du bsgrags/ gdul bya gsum la bshad cing

658.2(1): no/ /des bshad pa'i bon lung dang / rgyud dang / sngags dang / mtshan nyid dang /

659.21(1): rnyed/ da lta 'dug sa la tha dad mi rnyed pa'i phyir/ rang bzhin ka dag yin no/
